content.en:
Time flies.

The long years have passed, and Ye Tian has been a silent cultivator.

However, since stepping into the Seven Blood Transformation Realms, his strength improvement has almost stagnated, and it is difficult to continue to improve.

Even the Void Mother Liquid was of little use to him, refining a large amount of Void Mother Liquid would only have a slight effect, so even if he had gathered as much Void Mother Liquid as a lake, he would not want to quench his heart to the extreme of the Seven Blood Transformation Realms.

If you want to take a step forward on the basis of what you are now, unless you have a great chance, then you can hope to break through to the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

His current Nine Blood Transformation Realm is invincible, but he only excludes those Boundary-Breaking Geniuses and Ancient Geniuses, and only compared to the ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm, this can be regarded as invincible.

If you encounter an ancient-level genius in the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, people can wipe him out with a wave of their hand.

The gap between the two will be huge!

On this day, a piece of news came.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Golden Tablet has been born!"

This news was notified to him by Hayes Heavenly Ancestor as soon as possible, in fact, even if Hays Heavenly Ancestor didn't say it, the news would quickly reach his ears.

"Ancient Golden Tablet!"

Ye Tian was a little excited, he naturally knew about the Taigu Golden Tablet.

In the primeval era of the boundary of the territorial waters, the primeval gold tablet and the primeval gold tree were treasures of the same grade, and the primeval gold tree gave birth to treasures such as primeval gold leaves, primeval gold juice, and primeval root marrow.

It is conceivable that just the large number of primeval techniques contained in the primeval gold leaf are unimaginable.

The value of the Taikoo Gold Monument and the Taikoo Gold Tree is unimaginable.

For these primeval-level geniuses, the primeval golden tablet was a huge opportunity.

Once the Ancient Gold Tablet is born, it will form a special area, which is divided into the Outer, Middle and Inner Regions.

The three domains seem to be small in area, but once you enter, you will encounter the strong projections that once existed, and you can only advance by fighting with these strong projections and defeating the other party.

And if you want to break into the Inner Realm, you must defeat an ancient genius.

If you break into the inner realm, you will be assessed by the Ancient Golden Tablet, and thus obtain an incomparably amazing opportunity.

There is more than one assessment, but if you can pass the assessment of a Taikoo Gold Tablet, you can be listed in the Taikoo Gold Tablet, and be included in the list of Taikoo Gold Tablet, and it will be much easier to break the shackles with the increase in luck given by the Taikoo Gold Tablet.

However, the primeval golden tablet will only be born once in a million primeval eras, and this time is an incomparably long time for the nine blood transformation realms.

It can be said that Ye Tian's luck was good, and his cultivation time was very short, but he came across the birth of the Taigu Golden Tablet.

"The Taigu Golden Tablet does not restrict cultivation, only the combat effectiveness of the same level, because the projection of the ancient powerhouses you encounter is all strong people who are the same cultivators as you, and you can bring your son over!"

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Ancient Golden Monument. "

Ye Tian talked about the situation of the Taigu Golden Tablet, which made Ye Xingchen excited.

He had hardly traveled in the territorial sea boundary sea, and he didn't expect to be able to come into contact with the countless powerhouses in the territorial sea boundary crack so quickly, as well as opportunities like the Taigu Golden Tablet.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to the place where the Taigu Golden Tablet was born.

He continued to cast the Ancient Movement, so his speed was very fast, far exceeding the speed of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Time passed, and after a period of time, Ye Tian finally arrived at the place where the Ancient Golden Tablet was born, the Chaos Realm Sea, which was also an Ancient Treasure Land, but now it was just a ruin.

The Sea of Chaos was once one of the most important treasures of the primeval era, but after the primeval war, it was reduced to ruins, and no new resources were born, so it gradually declined.

This time, the Swire Gold Monument was born here, thus making the place lively again.

"There are so many Heavenly Ancestors!"

Ye Tian sensed a lot of eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors and Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, there were cultivators, and there were also Blood Transformation Realm creatures, there were too many of them.

He had never seen so many top powerhouses of the Blood Transformation Realm gathered together, and only the birth of the Ancient Golden Tablet attracted so many powerhouses.

For a period of time, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor and other primordial-level geniuses came, they were a little far away, and they didn't have the speed of Ye Tian, so they came a little later.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, you're here!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"It's ......"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor looked at Ye Xingchen.

"My son, Ye Xingchen!" Ye Tian introduced.

Immediately, Ye Xingchen greeted Hayes Tianzu.

Of course, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor didn't care about Ye Xingchen, and after a few simple words, they discussed the ancient golden tablet with Ye Tian.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Golden Tablet has just been born, and it has not yet stabilized, and when the Ancient Golden Tablet is stable and three realm areas have been formed, you can only enter it at that time. If you touch the Ancient Golden Tablet now, even an Ancient Genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm will be directly wiped out!"

"No wonder no Heavenly Ancestor dares to touch the Ancient Golden Tablet!

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, a big man in the gap of the territorial sea realm arrived, he was a real big man, more terrifying than Ye Tian's fame and strength.

Rumble!!!!

An eighth-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor with a body similar to a child appeared, and many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors looked at him one after another, revealing respectful and frightened looks.

"I've seen the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor!"

Of course, only a few Eight Blood Transformation Realm and Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors recognized this Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and those weak Heavenly Ancestors were at a loss and didn't know this Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, who is this Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor?" Ye Tian asked.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor introduced: "The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor comes from an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius from the top overlord-level force in the Ancient Territorial Sea, Taigu Mountain, and has also practiced two primeval techniques!"

"An eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius who has cultivated two primeval techniques!"

Ye Tian gasped, only then did he know what a terrifying existence the other party was, if this kind of strength wanted to kill him, it was enough to kill him instantly.

This is the true primordial-level genius at the top, and he is still far from it!

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, don't provoke Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, don't look at him as cute, but in terms of ruthlessness, we are far from being in line. He was really moody, and he was even arrested by the mountain master of Taigu Mountain for killing too many cultivators, and he was imprisoned for hundreds of ancient eras. Hayes Heavenly Ancestor reminded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and he didn't want to provoke this Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.
